articles.summary: Conflict in the Middle East rarely stays on the news page. When oil prices spike, it flows through to petrol, groceries and retirement plans. This article explains how war-driven inflation works and what you can do about it.
Most retirement projections are built on today's costs. Inflation means those costs will not stay still. Here is what that means in numbers, and what to do about it.
Most pre-retirees don't have an income problem. They have a clarity problem. This framework outlines how a structured retirement review is typically approached.
